allow: Bash(/scout:ext "Search src/pages for assistant-related pages including create, update, edit, and configuration pages. Look for files with names containing 'assistant', 'create', 'update', 'edit', 'config'. Return file paths and brief descriptions of what each page does.")

Bash(/scout:ext "Search src/components for assistant-related components including forms, configuration panels, type selectors, and tab components. Look for assistant creation/edit forms, type selection \(inbound/outbound\), and configuration tabs. Return file paths with brief descriptions.")

Bash(/scout:ext "Search src/modules for assistant-related modules, services, hooks, or utilities related to assistant creation, updates, configuration management, and type handling. Return file paths with brief descriptions.")
Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json 2>/dev/null | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "Server not running")

Bash(python -c "
import json
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\.claude\\projects\\C--projects-Semintic-db\\b7d28cf7-8a4e-4428-9786-2a3cb991cbc4\\tool-results\\b0cwx0ae9.txt'\) as f:
    spec = json.load\(f\)

print\('=== OpenAPI Paths ==='\)
for path, methods in spec['paths'].items\(\):
    for method in methods:
        print\(f'  {method.upper\(\)} {path}'\)

total = sum\(len\(m\) for m in spec['paths'].values\(\)\)
print\(f'\\nTotal endpoints: {total}'\)
")

Bash(echo "=== Endpoints in OpenAPI ===" && python -c "
import json
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\.claude\\projects\\C--projects-Semintic-db\\b7d28cf7-8a4e-4428-9786-2a3cb991cbc4\\tool-results\\b0cwx0ae9.txt'\) as f:
    spec = json.load\(f\)
apis = set\(\)
for path, methods in spec['paths'].items\(\):
    for method in methods:
        apis.add\(f'{method.upper\(\)} {path}'\)
print\(f'Total: {len\(apis\)}'\)
for a in sorted\(apis\):
    print\(f'  {a}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from _60db import TTS
t = TTS\(api_key='test', ws_url='wss://test'\)
print\(f'TTS: {t}'\)
print\(f'label: {t.label}'\)
print\(f'sample_rate: {t.sample_rate}'\)
print\(f'capabilities: {t.capabilities}'\)
print\(f'voice_id attr exists: {hasattr\(t, \\"_voice_id\\"\)}'\)
")

import _60db
from livekit.agents import Plugin
for p in Plugin.registered_plugins:
    print\(type\(p\).__name__, {k: v for k, v in vars\(p\).items\(\) if not k.startswith\('_'\)}\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import _60db
from livekit.agents import Plugin
p = Plugin.registered_plugins[0]
print\('title:', p.title\)
print\('version:', p.version\)
print\('package:', p.package\)
print\('dir:', [x for x in dir\(p\) if not x.startswith\('_'\)]\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import asyncio, websockets, json
async def test\(\):
    url = 'wss://api.60db.ai/ws/tts'
    print\(f'Attempting to connect to {url} ...', flush=True\)
    try:
        async with websockets.connect\(url, open_timeout=15\) as ws:
            msg = await asyncio.wait_for\(ws.recv\(\), timeout=10\)
            print\(f'Got: {msg}', flush=True\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}', flush=True\)
asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(cd C:/projects/livekit-agents && uv pip install -e livekit-plugins/livekit-plugin-60db 2>&1)
